commands.review_summary:
The PR deletes unused iOS helpers, views, protocol members, model fields, and associated tests, then adds a Periphery dead-code scan plus a `workflow_run` job that publishes findings to pull requests.

PR surface: Config +366, Other -1319. Total -953 across 43 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the introduced workflow defect: source inspection shows a stale completed run follows the artifact and comment path without a live-PR or exact-head check. The iOS deletion portion is cleanup rather than a reported bug.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The two merge-blocking workflow defects have a narrow mechanical repair on the PR branch; maintainer review can then focus on the otherwise well-supported iOS deletion set.
